subcodes.first_line: O herald of the Covenant! Thy letter dated the twenty-ninth of Sha'bán 1338 was received and perused with the utmost care. From the conduct of the friends [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی پیمان نامه بتاریخ ٢٩ شعبان ٣٨ رسید بدقت تمام ملاحظه گردید از روش احباء
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @status of kings; future of monarchy, @wisdom [hikmat], @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
